subcodes.first_line: O Husayn! This is not a day of sorrow. Rejoice thou amidst the concourse of the worlds, then soar aloft upon two wings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا حسین لیس الیوم یوم الاحزان ان استبشر بین ملا الاکوان ثم اصعد بجناحین
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
